modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: ImageNow documents fail to open due to server connection issues.

full_description_text: User tried to open documents in ImageNow. Received error about network connection being unavailable. Also noted path not found and program not responding. This issue persists and affects access to necessary documents.
short_description: ImageNow documents fail to open due to server connection issues.
description: User tried to open documents in ImageNow. Received error about network connection being unavailable. Also noted path not found and program not responding. This issue persists and affects access to necessary documents.
